test.command: TMPDIR=/home/whoami/dev/opengecko/openGecko/data bun --cwd "/home/whoami/dev/opengecko/openGecko" run test -- --maxWorkers=2 tests/runtime-diagnostics.test.ts tests/market-runtime.test.ts tests/market-freshness.test.ts tests/simple-price-parity.test.ts tests/coins-markets-parity.test.ts tests/coin-detail-parity.test.ts tests/stale-data.test.ts tests/app.test.ts

blockingIssues.description: The shared degraded-seeded-bootstrap truth was not fully reconciled because `tests/stale-data.test.ts` still encoded `degraded.stale_live_enabled: true` for that state after the foundation centralized it to false.

This feature should not be considered complete on its own because it changed diagnostics/test expectations for degraded seeded bootstrap while wider trust-slice coverage still expected the old truth at review time.
Commit `f4fe0d6` did not fully implement explicit `names`/`symbols` selector semantics or coverage; the follow-up fix in `617ff09` was required to satisfy that contract.

The feature added a contradictory degraded-seeded-bootstrap assertion (`stale_live_enabled: true`) in `tests/coin-detail-parity.test.ts`, which conflicted with the shared access policy and diagnostics contract later fixed in `d00a613`.
The original cross-surface coherence feature omitted end-to-end seeded-bootstrap and zero-live completed-boot coverage required by the validation contract.
The zero-live completed-boot follow-up still omitted `/coins/markets` and `/coins/{id}` assertions, so full end-to-end cross-surface zero-live coverage remains incomplete.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify how workers should handle red-test-first expectations when inheriting pre-existing dirty hunks and how to ensure all related cross-surface assertions are updated after shared runtime semantic changes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple reviews found features that changed shared runtime truth or claimed assertion coverage while leaving other in-scope tests on stale expectations (`shared-runtime-trust-foundation`, `coins-markets-trust-contract`).

rejectedObservations.observation: Record the exact pre-existing app-test doc-path mismatch in shared knowledge.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous; the blocker was already fixed by `trust-slice-targeted-gate-repair`, so the observation is no longer actionable shared state for this milestone synthesis.
